reviews.name: 룰****
reviews.content:
집꾸하기 좋은템 발견..!🤎 하우스를 선택했는데 색조합이 넘나 예뻐요!!
자기꺼인줄 어떻게 아는지 직접 뜯어서 확인해봤어요 집꾸템으로도 좋지만
필로우 역할까지해서 뉴 필로우가 생긴 강쥐는 행복합니다 :)
푹신푹신하고 봉봉그린은 에고프렌들리 소재라 안심하고 사용가능할거 같아요
파우치도 같이 줘서 감성템으로 선물하기에도 좋습니다...💙
취향에맞게 선택해서 가나디 친구들에게 선물해보세요! 🙂
reviews.content_en: Found such a great home décor item..!🤎 I chose the house and the color combination is absolutely gorgeous!! My pup figured out it was his own and actually tore it open to check it out 😄 It's great as a home décor piece, but it also doubles as a pillow, so my furry friend is one happy camper :) It's super fluffy and BONG BONG GREEN uses eco-friendly materials, so I feel confident using it. The pouch is included too, so it's perfect as a thoughtful gift..💙 Pick what suits your taste and give it to your furry buddies! 🙂

reviews.name: 홍밥풀
reviews.content:
지금 방을 꾸미고 있어서 인테리어 템으로 둘 쿠션이 필요했는데 봉봉그린 버디쿠션이 따악..🩷
저는 하우스를 선택했는데요! 진짜 너무너무 앙증맞고 귀여워요><..
한 개만 두어도 귀여운데 확실히 3개가 모여있을 때가 제일 귀여운 것 같아서 저는 추가로 구매할 예정이에요!!🏠🍎🌙

밥풀이가 장난감인 줄 알고 신나리 물어뜯더라구요 ^^..
밥풀이꺼 따로 제거 따로 사야 할 것 같습니다 ㅎ

인테리어 템으로도 좋은데 강아지들 장난감 + 베개로도 좋을 것 같아요!
특히 달은 턱을 받칠 수 있어서 베개로 좋아 보여서 밥풀이에게 선물해 주려구요 ㅎㅎ🐶
그리고 고급져보이는 더스트백도 같이 주니까 지인분들에게 선물용으로 좋아요!!

어느 집이든 잘 어울리는 마이홈 버디 쿠션이에요~~
넘나리 귀여워요🩷🩷
reviews.content_en: I'm currently decorating my room and needed a couple cushions for interior décor, and the BONG BONG GREEN buddy cushion is just perfect..🩷 I went with the house design! It's seriously so adorable and cute><.. Even one looks cute, but honestly it looks cutest when all 3 are displayed together, so I'm planning to buy more!!🏠🍎🌙 My pup Bapppuli thought the stuffing was a toy and started chewing on it ^^.. I might need to remove Bapppuli's separate one and buy another. It's great as an interior piece, and also works well as a toy + pillow for dogs! The moon one especially looks good as a pillow since it can support their chin, so I'm gifting it to Bapppuli hehe🐶 Plus it comes with a nice-looking dust bag, so it's great as a gift for friends!! The MY HOME buddy cushion goes well with any home~~ It's so incredibly cute🩷🩷

reviews.name: 설이
reviews.content:
🌙 감성충전 완료.zip
“오늘도 무사히 하루 마감.
설이는 달님이랑 같이 꿈나라 다녀올게요...💤”

설이 하우스에 포근함을 더해준
"봉봉그린 마이홈 버디 쿠션 ‘달님’"을 소개할게요 ! 
달 인형 하나 놓았을 뿐인데,
하우스 안에 몽글몽글한 감성 까지 차오르는 기분이에요. 

폭신하고 말랑한 곡선과 
안아보면 진짜 퐁신퐁신 감촉이 너무 좋아서
설이가 어느새 끌어안고 꿀잠 중이에요.
지금은 아예 베개처럼 턱 괴고 자는 모습이 국룰🫠💤

💚 앗 그런데 이 달님,
단순히 왕왕 귀엽기만 한 게 아니더라구요?!
에코 프렌들리 펫 토이 봉봉 그린에서 만들어 
지구까지 생각하는 아주 예쁘고 착한 친구 라는 것...!!

그리구 전용 더스트백에 쏙 들어 있어 선물 하기도 딱 좋구요,  
일기장에 붙이고 싶은 감성이라 SNS 감성까지 찰떡이에요!  

작은 달님 하나 생겼더니 설이의 집이 더 따뜻해졌어요 ^__________^! 
폭신한 촉감에, 보드라운 미소까지 달고 있어 한 번 안기면 절대 
못 놓는 매직쿠션이랍니다..! 

ㅁ 설이의 총평:
좋은 꿈 꾸고 싶을 땐 꼭 이 친구랑 껌딱지처럼 붙어있을래요!!!!! 

– 감성 사수 중인 개사원 설이가.
reviews.content_en:
🌙 Emotional recharge complete.zip
"Another day safely wrapped up.
Seol-i is going to dreamland with moon buddy...💤"

I'm introducing the "BONG BONG GREEN MY HOME buddy cushion 'Moon Buddy'" that added coziness to Seol-i's house!
Just by placing one moon plushie,
my house is filling up with this soft, fluffy vibe.

With its plush and soft curves,
when you hold it, the texture is so incredibly squishy that
Seol-i is already hugging it and taking the sweetest nap.
Now she's resting her chin on it like a pillow, which is peak cuteness🫠💤

💚 Oh but wait, this moon buddy,
it's not just super cute!
Made by eco-friendly pet toy brand BONG BONG GREEN,
it's such a beautiful and kind friend that cares about the earth...!!

And it comes in its own dust bag, making it perfect for gifting,
and with that emotional aesthetic, it's so Instagram-worthy!

With just one little moon buddy, Seol-i's home feels so much warmer ^__________^!
With that plush feel and soft smile, once you hug it, you can never
let go—it's a magic cushion indeed..!

Seol-i's Final Review:
Whenever I want to have sweet dreams, I want to stick to this buddy like glue!!!!!

– From Seol-i, a devoted pet parent on emotional vibes.

reviews.name: 김나무
reviews.content:
포근한 나무 집에 잘 어울릴 것 같아 호다닥 데려온 마이홈 버디 쿠션!
너무 귀여워서 셋 중에 고민이 되었는데, 소파에 자리 잡은 곰 친구와도 찰떡일 것 같아 사과를 선택했습니다!

독립적인 강아지라 잘 때도 집에서 혼자 자는 나무이기에 기존에도 베고 자는 쿠션을 있었는데요, 요 봉봉그린 쿠션을 넣어줬더니 솜도 빵빵하고 탄탄해서 기대서 자기 편한지 기존 쿠션이 아닌 요걸 베고 자더라구요! 애착 베개로 추천드림니다..🤎

또한, 재사용 가능한 파우치에 넣어주셔서 활용하기도 좋아요! 나무의 털복숭이 친구들에게 선물하기도 좋을 것 같네요!

기존에도 봉봉그린 장난감이 에코 프렌들리 소재여서 많이 애정했는데, 요런 신상품은 너무나 환영입니다!
reviews.content_en: Brought home the MY HOME buddy cushion thinking it would match our cozy wooden house perfectly! It was so cute I had trouble choosing between the three, but I figured the apple design would go great with the bear friend on the sofa, so I went with that! My pup is pretty independent and sleeps alone in the wooden house, and she already had a pillow cushion to rest on, but once I added this BONG BONG GREEN cushion, the stuffing is so full and firm that she now prefers leaning on this new one instead of her old pillow! I'd definitely recommend it as an attachment cushion..🤎 Plus it comes in a reusable pouch, so it's convenient to use and great as a gift for other furry friends! I already loved BONG BONG GREEN toys for being eco-friendly, so this new product line is very much welcome!

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content:
우리 집 감자에게 새로운 베프가 생겼어요 ʚ♡ɞ

감자가 눈치 빠르게 자기 꺼라고 인식했는지 껴안고 낮잠 자더라고요 😴🍎 ㄱㅇㅇ.. 애착 베개 제대로 정착했습니다:)

귀엽고 감도 높은 디자인 덕분에 인테리어 소품으로도 제격이고
에코 프렌들리 소재로 만들어져서 감자가 맘껏 물고 놀아도 걱정 없어요 !! 

예쁜데 실용적이고, 강아지도 좋아하는 진짜 찐템 찾으신다면 
살포시 추천드려요 👍
reviews.content_en: Our sweet potato got a new best friend ʚ♡ɞ Potato quickly figured it out was hers and started cuddling it for naps 😴🍎 The attachment pillow has truly settled in :) Thanks to its cute and high-design aesthetic, it doubles as an interior decoration, and since it's made with eco-friendly materials, I don't worry even when Potato chews and plays with it!! If you're looking for something pretty but practical that your pup will actually love, I'd gently recommend this 👍

reviews.name: 프린
reviews.content:
달은 원래 하얗다. 바나나 속살 아니고 달이에요!🌜
크림 컬러라서 다른 노란 달 쿠션보다 유니크하게 느껴지는 봉봉그린 버디쿠션! 길쭉한 모양 때문에 애착 인형으로도 좋고, 턱받이 쿠션으로도 쓸 수 있어요. 강아지 소파 또는 침대 위에 얹어주면 감성 인테리어 완성. 강아지 집꾸나 펫테리어 좋아하시는 분들은 세 개 다 갖고 있으면 인스타용 사진 찍을 때 요긴하게 쓰일 것 같아요🏠🫧
reviews.content_en: The moon is originally white. Not banana flesh, but the moon!🌜 With its cream color, the BONG BONG GREEN buddy cushion feels more unique than other yellow moon cushions! The elongated shape makes it great as an attachment toy and also works as a chin-rest cushion. Place it on your pup's sofa or bed and you've got instant aesthetic home décor. If you love decorating your dog's space or pet interior design, having all three would be super handy for those Instagram-worthy photos🏠🫧

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 넘귀여워용 하나씩 뜯어줄려구 쟁여뒀어용 ㅎㅎ 넘귀엽고 좋아용
reviews.content_en: So so cute! Bought one of each to keep for later hehe So cute and love it

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content_en: The apple cushion is so cute hehe My dog really loves it

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 댕댕이가 좋아해요. 아주 잘 가지고 놀고있어요.
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it. She's been playing with it a lot.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it so much

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content_en: It's adorable and good. Definitely get it

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 아하. 봉봉그린이 바잇미 브랜드였군요. 상품텍보고 알았습니다. 메이드 바이 코리아같이 생겨서는 중국이구여.! 참고하세요~ 사실 그냥 놓고만 보면 다이소에서 5000원정도로 팔 것 같은 느낌인데 감성템으로 샀어요;
reviews.content_en: Oh. So BONG BONG GREEN is a BITE ME brand. Found out from the product description. It looks like Made in Korea but it's actually made in China!!! Just a heads up~ To be honest, if you just look at it, it seems like something Daiso would sell for 5,000 won, but I bought it as an emotional décor piece;

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요~ 홈 인테리어 용으로 구매했어요 ㅎㅎㅎ 사이즈 작아서 강아지들은 베개로도 잘 쓰겠어요~~
reviews.content_en: It's so cute~ I bought it for home interior decoration hehe The size is small so my dogs can use it well as a pillow too~~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content_en:
I love it so much
Thank you!
Just pretty. Good good, you should buy it
